name: Plank-Based Abs Builder Circuit
description: A fast and intense circuit of plank variations designed to build strong, defined abs by targeting core stability and strength.

activities.notes: Reach forward to keep your body aligned. If you're shaking, that's your core working.
Crunch tight through the core. Alternate sides, avoid rotating hips.
Stay strong through the motions. Squeeze glutes and core to prevent sagging.
Finish with power. Squeeze your core at the top for maximum engagement.

tips: Perform exercises consecutively with minimal rest between them
Focus on form and core engagement over speed
